channel.title: THE SIGNAL // dated tech calls
channel.description: A self-grading public oracle. Dated, falsifiable tech calls, graded in public.

item.title: mattpocock/skills is rocketing up GitHub trending. The trajectory says it crosses into m...
item.description: mattpocock/skills is rocketing up GitHub trending. The trajectory says it crosses into mainstream dev workflows within two quarters. // OPEN // WIN IF "MATTPOCOCK" RESURFACES BEFORE "RUNNING" BY 2026-07-17

item.title: Running local models is good now is the conversation on HN today. The signal says a majo...
item.description: Running local models is good now is the conversation on HN today. The signal says a major incumbent ships a near-identical feature before Q4. // OPEN // WIN IF "RUNNING" HAS NOT GONE QUIET BY 2026-07-17

item.title: KDE Plasma 6.7 released is having its breakout moment. THE SIGNAL calls it now, in writi...
item.description: KDE Plasma 6.7 released is having its breakout moment. THE SIGNAL calls it now, in writing: this is the start, not the peak. Tail the machine or bet against it. // OPEN // WIN IF "RELEASED" OUT-MENTIONS "CHALLENGE" BY 2026-07-17

item.title: Congrats to the Google I/O 2026 Writing Challenge Winners! is what developers are writin...
item.description: Congrats to the Google I/O 2026 Writing Challenge Winners! is what developers are writing about today. This kind of grassroots momentum usually precedes a hiring wave. // OPEN // WIN IF THE PULSE INDEX CROSSES 81 BY 2026-07-17

item.title: The HN front page is piling onto local-first sync engines. Expect the tooling around it ...
item.description: The HN front page is piling onto local-first sync engines. Expect the tooling around it to consolidate into one default winner within two quarters. // HIT // WIN IF "LOCAL" RESURFACES ACROSS THE FEEDS BY 2026-07-15

item.title: Fresh cs.AI/cs.LG work on test-time compute scaling just hit arXiv. Calling it now: this...
item.description: Fresh cs.AI/cs.LG work on test-time compute scaling just hit arXiv. Calling it now: this goes from paper to shipped product feature inside nine months. // HIT // WIN IF "COMPUTE" RESURFACES ACROSS THE FEEDS BY 2026-07-14

item.title: Devs are starring ggml-org/llama.cpp hard today. Betting it picks up a corporate backer ...
item.description: Devs are starring ggml-org/llama.cpp hard today. Betting it picks up a corporate backer or a managed-cloud offering within six months. // HIT // WIN IF "LLAMA" RESURFACES ACROSS THE FEEDS BY 2026-07-03

item.title: vercel/ai is rocketing up GitHub trending. The trajectory says it crosses into mainstrea...
item.description: vercel/ai is rocketing up GitHub trending. The trajectory says it crosses into mainstream dev workflows within two quarters. // HIT // WIN IF "VERCEL" RESURFACES ACROSS THE FEEDS BY 2026-07-01

item.title: Dev.to writers are rallying around typed API clients. Expect tutorials to outpace the do...
item.description: Dev.to writers are rallying around typed API clients. Expect tutorials to outpace the docs and adoption to snowball within a quarter. // MISS // WIN IF "TYPED" RESURFACES ACROSS THE FEEDS BY 2026-06-14

item.title: Ars is covering AI data-center power demand. When it crosses from tech press to mainstre...
item.description: Ars is covering AI data-center power demand. When it crosses from tech press to mainstream, regulation or a major incumbent move follows within two quarters. // HIT // WIN IF "POWER" RESURFACES ACROSS THE FEEDS BY 2026-06-29

item.title: The HN front page is piling onto on-device inference runtimes. Expect the tooling around...
item.description: The HN front page is piling onto on-device inference runtimes. Expect the tooling around it to consolidate into one default winner within two quarters. // HIT // WIN IF "INFERENCE" RESURFACES ACROSS THE FEEDS BY 2026-06-28

item.title: Lobsters is chewing on deterministic build systems. When the careful crowd gets interest...
item.description: Lobsters is chewing on deterministic build systems. When the careful crowd gets interested, it tends to be a default tool a year out. // MISS // WIN IF "DETERMINISTIC" RESURFACES ACROSS THE FEEDS BY 2026-06-12

item.title: Fresh cs.AI/cs.LG work on sparse mixture-of-experts routing just hit arXiv. Calling it n...
item.description: Fresh cs.AI/cs.LG work on sparse mixture-of-experts routing just hit arXiv. Calling it now: this goes from paper to shipped product feature inside nine months. // HIT // WIN IF "MIXTURE" RESURFACES ACROSS THE FEEDS BY 2026-06-24

item.title: Devs are starring zed-industries/zed hard today. Betting it picks up a corporate backer ...
item.description: Devs are starring zed-industries/zed hard today. Betting it picks up a corporate backer or a managed-cloud offering within six months. // HIT // WIN IF "ZED" RESURFACES ACROSS THE FEEDS BY 2026-06-22
